Bus Timings

F06 Bus Timings - Al Rashidiya Bus Station to Al Rashidiya and Back

February 21, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s public transportation system is renowned for its efficiency and convenience, providing residents and visitors with a reliable means of travel throughout the city. One of the key routes is Bus F6, which operates between Al Rashidiya Bus Station and various significant stops within the Rashidiya area. This guide offers a comprehensive look at the F6 route, including operational timings, major stops, and helpful travel tips for a seamless journey.

Operational Details

Bus F6 runs frequently throughout the day, catering to the needs of commuters. Here’s the detailed timetable for Bus F6 departing from Al Rashidiya Bus Station:

From Al Rashidiya Bus Station From Al Rashidiya

05:27 05:43
05:30 06:13
05:57 06:28

Bus F06 Timetable

For a complete schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for the F06 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Fares for Bus F6 can be paid using the Nol Card, Dubai’s cashless payment system. Tickets for journeys within a single zone are priced at AED 3, with an additional AED 0.5 charged per kilometer for travel beyond the designated zone. Passengers can easily recharge their Nol cards online or at designated kiosks throughout the city, ensuring a seamless travel experience.

Route Overview

The F6 bus route traverses various significant stops, connecting residential areas, educational institutions, and places of worship. Here’s a breakdown of the key stops along the F6 route:

  1. Al Rashidiya Bus Station (Start/Intermediate Stop): The main hub for the route.

  2. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking: Convenient parking facilities for commuters.

  3. Rashidiya, Park: A local park offering recreational space for residents.

  4. Rashidiya, Clinic: Access to medical services for the community.

  5. Rashidiya 4: A residential area serving the local neighborhoods.

  6. Rashidiya 5: Another residential area along the route.

  7. Jassmi Masjid: A cultural landmark for visitors interested in local religious sites.

  8. Street 11: Access to various community amenities.

  9. Rashidiya Ibraheem Khaleel Masjid, Street 11: A significant mosque in the area.

  10. Saud Al Mulla Mosque: A notable landmark for worshippers.

  11. Rashidiya 2A Street: A key thoroughfare within the residential area.

  12. Mariam Masjid: A prominent mosque serving the local community.

  13. Rashidiya Shopping Center: A popular destination for shopping and dining.

  14. Nad Rashid, Souq: A traditional market offering local goods.

  15. Qutami Masjid: Another place of worship along the route.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Fatima English School: An educational institution catering to the community.

  2. Umm Hani School: Access point for students attending this local school.

  3. Rashidiya 2: An additional residential access point.

  4. Rashidiya 3: Further residential access along the route.

  5. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival: The endpoint of the journey back at the bus station.

This extensive route connects essential services and cultural landmarks, meeting the needs of residents while offering visitors a convenient way to explore Dubai.

Accessibility and Services

Key accessibility features include:

  • Wheelchair Ramps for easy boarding.

  • Reserved Seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-Visual Aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

These amenities guarantee that Bus F6 is an inclusive and accessible option for everyone.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

1.

  1. Jassmi Masjid: A spiritual site reflecting the local culture.

  2. Rashidiya Shopping Center: A bustling hub for shopping and dining options.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip, a traveler took the F06 bus from Al Rashidiya Bus Station, enjoying a scenic journey through Rashidiya. They passed Rashidiya, Park, filled with families, and admired the stunning architecture of Jassmi Masjid. The bus stopped at the Rashidiya Shopping Center, a local favorite for shopping, before continuing to Nad Rashid, Souq, where vibrant stalls offered unique handicrafts and spices.

Travel Tips for Bus F6

  • Check the Timetable: Be aware of the bus schedule to minimize waiting times, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Nol Card: This makes fare payments easy and quick. Ensure that you recharge your card regularly.
  • Stay Informed: Use the RTA app for real-time tracking of buses along the route.
  • Plan Your Journey: Familiarize yourself with key stops in advance, especially if you are visiting the area for the first time.
  • Travel During Off-Peak Hours: If possible, try to travel during non-peak times to avoid crowded buses.

Bus F6 plays a vital role in Dubai’s public transport system, ensuring crucial connectivity throughout the Rashidiya area.

Whether commuting to work, exploring local attractions, or simply wandering through the city, Bus F6 provides a convenient and enjoyable travel experience. For a complete guide to the Dubai bus route, plan your journey today and experience the ease of navigating Dubai’s vibrant communities!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
